Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The original model is root equals sequence create req approve req parallel create po receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The intended standard logic is a strict ordered flow from create purchase requisition through close case so the parallel block is too permissive

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The current structure allows invalid behavior such as create purchase order after receiving goods matching before receiving invoice and paying before receiving goods or invoice

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The fix is to replace the broad parallel block with a sequence that enforces create purchase order then receive goods then receive invoice then match invoice to po then pay invoice

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This corrected structure preserves all activities and only allows the normal domain appropriate order because each activity becomes a prerequisite for the next one

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: A corrected process tree is root equals sequence create purchase requisition approve purchase requisition create purchase order receive goods receive invoice match invoice to po pay invoice close case
